markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Panther's marketing team and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Panther faces challenges in content creation: bandwidth limitations, reactive vs. proactive approach, and need for technical depth](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint + 12-month execution model, using AI workflows and expert oversight to produce high-volume, quality content](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [Panther team is interested but skeptical about AI's ability to handle their highly technical subject matter](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to provide workshop recording, create POC content piece, team to review internally](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Topics

### Panther's Content Challenges

  - [Bandwidth limitations: Need to produce wide breadth of content (blogs, sales enablement, product pages, white papers)](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Reactive vs. proactive approach: Currently focused on product launches, not strategic topics](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Technical depth: All content requires high level of technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Resource optimization: Small marketing team trying to balance multiple priorities](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint + 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows with expert human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Focus on creating content for AI search visibility (AEO/GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Daily publishing capability, wide topic coverage](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Handles content creation, staging, and CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Analytics for LLM visibility and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Uses sophisticated AI workflows beyond simple prompts](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
  - [Incorporates client-specific artifacts (personas, style guides, product info)](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Multi-step process: brief generation, research, outlining, drafting, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Human experts review and refine content throughout](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Can integrate client team quotes and insights](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)

### Technical Content Capabilities

  - [Successfully working with technical clients (e.g., Augment Code, Abnormal Security)](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Can handle technical subject matter, but not code snippets or cutting-edge developments](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Uses client-provided resources and approved sources for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Focuses on thought leadership, product comparisons, and industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Proof of Concept and Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide workshop recording for team review](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Will create a POC content piece based on Panther's guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Team to internally discuss and evaluate the offering](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Potential future meeting with GrowthX CEO and Panther leadership](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to invite team to Slack channel for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1963.0)
  - [Tyler to share Marcel's workshop recording](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Anna/Katie to provide examples of ideal content (from competitors like Wiz)](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [Seema/Katie to brainstorm topic for POC content piece](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [GrowthX to create POC content based on provided guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [Team to review POC and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting with GrowthX CEO if POC is successful](https://fathom.video/share/o3T9v2Xy96wPCZmmA835x58z7jy9b4Md?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
